# Dykes Motors Power Equipment

> Authorized Ferris mower dealer in Collins, Mississippi. We sell new Ferris zero-turn, stand-on, and walk-behind mowers, plus utility trailers, parts, and service for all major mower brands. Part of the family-owned Dykes Motors dealership group.

## Business Information

- **Name:** Dykes Motors Power Equipment
- **Address:** 3069 Hwy 49, Collins, MS 39428
- **Sales Phone:** (601) 909-5380
- **Service & Parts Phone:** (601) 336-2541
- **Email:** info@dykesmotors.com
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 9am–6pm (Sales) / 9am–7pm (Service) · Sat 9am–2pm · Sun Closed
- **Area Served:** Mississippi, primarily Collins, Hattiesburg, Laurel, Jackson, and surrounding South Mississippi
- **Parent Company:** Dykes Motors (dykesmotors.com)

## What We Sell

- **Ferris Zero-Turn Mowers:** 300e (electric), 300R/S, 500S, F60, IS 600, IS 700, ISX 800, ISX 2200, ISX 3300, IS 2600, IS 6200 series
- **Ferris Stand-On Mowers:** SRS Z1, SRS Z2, SRS Z3X series
- **Ferris Walk-Behind Mowers:** FW15, FW25, FW45 series
- **Ferris Hurricane Blowers:** FB1000, FB2000, FB3000
- **Ferris Spreaders/Sprayers:** Rover XC, Pathfinder, Venture series
- **Utility Trailers:** 5x10 and other sizes
- **OEM Parts:** Ferris and Briggs & Stratton

## What We Service

Ferris (authorized), Husqvarna, Scag, Exmark, Toro, Gravely, Bad Boy, Snapper, and most major mower brands. Oil changes, blade sharpening, engine diagnostics, hydrostatic drive service, deck repair, electrical systems, and seasonal tune-ups.

## Financing

Financing available through top national lenders. Rates as low as 4.9% APR up to 84 months for qualified credit. Soft credit check for pre-qualification (no credit impact).

## Returns & Warranty

Returns accepted for defective products only, handled through Ferris manufacturer warranty. No exchanges. Ferris warranty: 3-year residential / 2-year commercial (varies by model). See /shipping-returns for full policy.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://www.dykespower.com
- Catalog: https://www.dykespower.com/catalog
- Service: https://www.dykespower.com/service

- Blog: https://www.dykespower.com/blog
- Shipping & Returns: https://www.dykespower.com/shipping-returns

## Blog Topics

Educational content for Mississippi mower buyers: Ferris model comparisons, independent suspension explained, zero-turn vs stand-on, acreage-based mower sizing, commercial mower service intervals, utility trailer guides, local dealer advantages.

## Contact for Quotes

Prefer a phone call or in-person visit for quotes and product recommendations. Online inquiry form at /contact. Most equipment purchases are picked up at our Collins, MS location; local delivery available for a fee.
